problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: Combining Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
